_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish overall enterprise information security architecture (EISA) with the organization’s overall security strategy.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business objectives, with defined investment priorities, milestones, accountability assignments, and success metrics.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-001 (DA, cosine: 0.497), SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.491).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.574). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise, strategy]. DCWF-only terms [architecture, eisa, establish, information, organization, overall] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, business, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.880, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Establish overall enterprise information security architecture (EISA) with the o" and "Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business ob" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 < STS 0.574 (gap -0.076). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [architecture, eisa, establish] and [accountability, ai, aligned] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.8%. Shared tokens: [enterprise, strategy]. DCWF-only: [architecture, eisa, establish, information, organization, overall]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, business, data].
